enrichment.summary: Kyle logs a typical day in Boulder: a 12.5-mile bike commute, a frustrated visit to his mom's house over a phone call he couldn't complete, and an evening spent iterating on his website. He also shares his new habit of listening to a different audiobook each day at work, mentioning the book 'Life in a Black Regiment.'
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: prefers cycling through different audiobooks rather than repeating the same one — more exciting
found the day's design work frustrating but worthwhile — kept changing things until something felt right
